src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/dc/gtf.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger imports and field to enable logging in the adapter.
Refactor getStringAsSeconds to handle variable-length time strings (e.g., hours > 23) by parsing from the end and using Integer.parseInt for hours.
src/main/java/com/github/skjolber/dc/gtf.before:
private static int getStringAsSeconds(String string) { // 14:30:00
	return 
		(string.charAt(6) - '0') * 10 + (string.charAt(7) - '0') // seconds
		+ (string.charAt(3) - '0') * 600 + (string.charAt(4) - '0') * 60 // minutes
		+ (string.charAt(0) - '0') * 36000 + (string.charAt(1) - '0') * 3600 // hours
		;
}
